    """You receive two integer intervals, where each interval includes both its endpoints and has a start no greater than its end. The intersection of these intervals must be found.     intersection((1, 2), (2, 3)) ==> "NO"
    intersection((-1, 1), (0, 4)) ==> "NO"
    intersection((-3, -1), (-5, 5)) ==> "YES"
